subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon the Kingdom of Abha! If thou seekest the Beauty of the All-Glorious One, lay hold of the hem of contentment. And if thou thirsteth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظر بملکوت ابهی اگر طالب جمال ذوالجلالی تشبث بذیل رضا بجو و اگر تشنه
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @love of God, @firmness in the Covenant
